personality_one_liner: A sharp, high-contrast, tactical command center designed for night patrols, rapid reporting, and high-visibility operations.

spacing.rule: Dense but scannable. Use smaller gaps inside metric cards and strict md padding on edges. No wasted space, prioritize glanceability over generous white space.

do's: Avoid blur/glass on dark-first utility interfaces to prioritize clarity and performance, especially for dense data screens.
dont's: No frosted glass overlays; rely on solid surfaceSecondary and surfaceTertiary for elevation.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Command center for the current shift with high-level stats, clock-in CTA, and emergency access.

states.loading: Centered brand-colored spinner with 'Syncing Operations...' text.
states.empty: No active shift today. Display secondary illustration and a link to Open Shifts.
states.error: Failed to load dashboard. Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky primary clock-in CTA at the bottom. Top section features a large active shift card with Barlow Condensed metrics (Time, Site, Guard Count). Below it, priority announcements with red/amber badges. Use horizontal scrolling cards for quick actions.

screens.name: Open Shifts
screens.purpose: A marketplace to claim available shifts, filtered by date and site.

states.empty: Phosphor CalendarBlank icon + 'No open shifts matching your criteria'.
states.error: Unable to fetch shifts. Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky pinned filter row (Date, Site, Distance). Shift cards fill 100% width with sharp edges, displaying pay rate, time, and distance. Contextual 'Claim Shift' button aligned right inside the card. Uncomplicated layout.

screens.name: Time Clock
screens.purpose: GPS and selfie verification flow for clocking in/out with precise timestamps.

states.error: Location mismatch error or Camera permission denied with clear resolution steps.

screens.layout: Large Barlow Condensed timestamp taking up the top third. Live map view (dark mode) confirming geofence. A prominent, full-width selfie capture area with overlay grid, followed by an oversized 'Confirm Clock-In' button at the bottom.

screens.name: Digital Wallet
screens.purpose: Digital presentation of employee ID and security licences for quick scanning.

states.error: Failed to load wallet. Tap to refresh.

screens.layout: Mimics physical cards. A high-contrast Employee ID card with the user's photo and a large, scannable QR code centered. Horizontal swipe/pager to view secondary licences (First Aid, WHMIS) with scannable barcodes if applicable.

screens.name: Payroll
screens.purpose: Pipeline tracker showing hours worked and progression from Submitted to Paid.
screens.layout: Header shows 'Next Payday' in large display font. Below it, a vertical timeline/pipeline component showing the status (Submitted -> Under Review -> Released -> Paid) with active states highlighted in green/success tokens.

screens.name: Incident Reporting
screens.purpose: Structured form to log incidents, injuries, or property damage with photo evidence.

states.error: Failed to submit report. Draft saved locally.

screens.layout: Single-column form. Labels above inputs. Dark input backgrounds (surfaceTertiary). A clear area for photo attachments using grid layout, and a digital signature pad at the bottom above a sticky Submit CTA.

dashboard_hero_bg.alt: Dark city skyline at night to give a tactical night-shift vibe behind the main dashboard header.

guard_profile_avatar.alt: Professional security guard wearing a cap in black and white.

incident_report_abstract.alt: Abstract dark camera lens, used as a header graphic for the incident reporting or monitoring screens.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility guidelines. No blur or glassmorphism effects unless absolutely required; rely on solid background layers (surfaceSecondary, surfaceTertiary) to create elevation.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all metrics, timers, pay rates, and live indicators. Use 'DM Sans' for body text and labels.
For the open shift marketplace, use a sticky filter row and ensure shift cards have clear hierarchy (Time -> Location -> Pay -> Action).
For the digital wallet, design the ID card to be high-contrast and easily scannable in dark environments. Ensure the QR code sits on a light background box if necessary for scanning compatibility.
The primary accent is Amber/High-Vis Orange (#F59E0B). Use it for primary actions, active shift indicators, and important alerts. Use 'error' red ONLY for genuine errors or critical security alarms.
Always apply a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 70%+ surfaceInverse) when placing text over any background image (like the dashboard hero image) to ensure WCAG readability.

Since the `image_selector_tool` did not find a real Skyhawk Security logo, implement the approved fallback: create a circular container using 'brandTertiary' background with the initials 'SH' in 'onBrandTertiary' text at weight 500.
Integrate haptic feedback on all primary interactions: clock-ins, shift claims, and tab switching.
